package.name: trajectory_bridge
package.description: Bridges MoveIt FollowJointTrajectory actions to Float32MultiArray servo commands. Acts as an action server for arm_controller (joint_1..joint_5) and hand_controller (joint_6); executes trajectories by publishing joint angles (rad→deg) to /servo_angles, which the arm ESP32 firmware subscribes to via PCA9685. Open-loop — servos have no encoder feedback, so the FJT `actual` field echoes `desired` and `error` is left empty.
